cdsiSource: Out-of-scope for CDSI extraction (HPV not in 10-antigen audit set), but fix verified against CDC ACIP HPV guidance

cases.description: Catch-up cutoff at 27y birthday (am=324mo), not 26y birthday (am=312mo)
cases.rationale: Bug from great-gates AUDIT G1: previous code `am > 312` made 26y1m-26y11m patients display as 27-45y SCDM. CDC: catch-up through age 26y. Fixed by switching to `am >= 228 && am < 324` for catch-up window. Status 'recommended' (catch-up) — note text varies.
At exactly 27y, patient enters SCDM window. Both isCatchup26 and isShared2745 → status 'recommended'. Note: hpvStatus is 'recommended' for both arms; differentiator is the description string.
